name: spotify
description: Control Spotify playback — search, play, pause, skip, playlists

tools.name: spotify_current
tools.description: Show what is currently playing on Spotify
tools.planner_hint: Use to check what song is playing on Spotify right now. No arguments needed.

tools.name: spotify_search
tools.description: Search Spotify for a song or artist
tools.planner_hint: Use to search Spotify for songs. Format: query=song name or artist name

tools.name: spotify_play
tools.description: Play a song on Spotify by name or URI
tools.planner_hint: Use to play a song on Spotify. Format: query=song name. Or: uri=spotify:track:XXXXXXXX. Spotify must be open on a device first.

tools.name: spotify_pause
tools.planner_hint: Use to pause the current Spotify playback. No arguments needed.

tools.name: spotify_resume
tools.planner_hint: Use to resume paused Spotify playback. No arguments needed.

tools.name: spotify_next
tools.description: Skip to next track on Spotify
tools.planner_hint: Use to skip to the next song on Spotify. No arguments needed.

tools.name: spotify_previous
tools.description: Go back to previous track on Spotify
tools.planner_hint: Use to go back to the previous song on Spotify. No arguments needed.

tools.name: spotify_playlists
tools.planner_hint: Use to show all playlists in the user's Spotify library. No arguments needed.
